slides.title: A *diverse gut* is a sign of aging well.
slides.sub: The trillions of microbes inside you shift with age. Variety on your plate helps keep them thriving.

slides.title: Your gut is an organ
slides.body: The microbes in your gut shape immunity and mood. Their richness often *fades with age*.

slides.title: Diversity is the goal
slides.body: A wide mix of microbes is linked to *healthier aging*. A narrow one tends to track with frailty.

slides.title: Add fermented foods
slides.body: Yogurt, kefir, kimchi and sauerkraut deliver live cultures. A daily spoonful *can help feed* the mix.

slides.title: Feed it many plants
slides.body: Different plants feed different microbes. Aiming for *thirty plants a week* builds real variety.

slides.title: Variety, not perfection
slides.body: You do not need a strict diet. Just a colorful, varied plate that *keeps your gut diverse*.

slides.title: Feed the years that *feel good*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your food, sleep and movement and turns the habits that protect your healthspan into one daily number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The secret to a healthy gut isn't one superfood. It's variety. 🌿

A diverse microbiome is linked to healthier aging. Feed it fermented foods and as many different plants as you can. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the food and habits that age you well into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Feed a Healthy Gut as You Age
